author: Nguyễn Văn Duy
description: Persistent Red and Lavalink dashboard for Discord, including bot health, latency, uptime, Audio node state, active music rooms, and a live command index generated from currently loaded cogs.
install_msg: Load with `[p]load musicstatus`, configure `[p]musicstatus setchannel #bot-status`, then refresh both panels with `[p]musicstatus now`. Use `[p]musicstatus commands` to refresh only the live command index.
short: Persistent bot health and live command dashboard.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord guild, channel, status-message, and command-index message IDs required to maintain the configured dashboard.
